ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Customer reports internet outage since yesterday. Agent confirms area outage and estimates 24-hour resolution.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: Hi, my internet is not working.
Agent: I'm sorry to hear that. Let me check your connection status.
Customer: It's been down since yesterday morning.
Agent: I can see there's an outage in your area. Our team is working on it.
Customer: When will it be fixed?
Agent: We expect it to be resolved within 24 hours.
